case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. IDREES HOLLIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-12-2022 CONTINUED TO JUL-12-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
